Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John O''''Connor, Esq. (415-982-3600) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Kristen Swilley.
No other Appearances.

Plaintiff does not contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling:

Defendant''s Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint is not uncertain, ambiguous or unintelligible within the meaning of CCP 430.10(f). Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-23-2015 Continued To Aug-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on Thursday, July 23, 2015. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendants Del Curto Properties and Carolyn Enfante's Demurrer To Complaint is continued to August 13, 2015 on Court's own motion. Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (501/REQ)

Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Continued To Jul-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty John O'Connor (415-982-3600) appearing for Plaintiff Kristen Swilley.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer To Complaint is continued to July 23, 2015. Moving party is ordered to provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint (SFRL 2.6C) no later than June 30, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.
